---
title: "Nathalia Portilla"
categories: [MSc]
image: ../people-images/nathalia-portilla.jpeg
about :
  template: jolla
  image: ../people-images/nathalia-portilla.jpeg
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/alejandrocs_98
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/alejandrocs98
---

Hi my name is Natha.
